linkedin.text:
One airport. The entire French Riviera at your guests' feet.

Nice is the smartest base for a multi-day incentive, and most planners underrate it. You land at a major international hub, and within a short drive you have Monaco, Cannes, Antibes and the Côte d'Azur — without the logistics nightmare of moving a group across a region.

That proximity is the whole strategy. Seafront galas one evening, a hilltop villa dinner the next, a coastal day trip in between — all from a single elegant home base. Less transfer time, more experience.

This is where production matters. We handle the permits, the transfers, the vendor coordination and the timing, so your guests only ever feel the glamour, never the machinery behind it. From business to pleasure — done right.

Picturing the Riviera for your 2026 program? DM us your dates and group size, or book a call, and we'll build a draft plan this week.

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #MICE
linkedin.cta: DM us or book a call
